title: Meow Special
description: A side branch of Meow Mods for special occasion and/or events
body:
# Meow Special - Spark A side branch of Meow Mods for special occasions and events What is Meow Special? Meow Special is a curated collection of limited-time modpacks designed for seasonal events and special occasions. Each edition offers a unique, themed experience that pushes players into new challenges and adventures.
⚙️ Spark ✨ Meow Spark is a casual sandbox modpack where machinery and the arcane coexist in your everyday adventures. There are no forced paths or complex energy grids—just the creative freedom to combine Create’s mechanical contraptions with the powerful sorcery of Iron's Spells. - Build Without Limits: Take to the skies with Create Aeronautics and explore vast new biomes from the deck of your own custom airship. - Everyday Magic: Enhance your gear with Apotheosis and weave spells seamlessly alongside your automation. - A World Rediscovered: Experience unique terrain generation designed for those who love to explore and build at their own pace. No pressure, no mandatory goals. Just you, your inventions, and the spark of discovery.
A special thank you to all the developers of the mods in this pack!

🌊 The Flod 🛶 The great flood has transformed the world into an endless ocean of desperation and survival. Civilization has drowned, and only the most adaptable will endure. Can you rebuild humanity from the remnants of a submerged world?

This Survival Edition Features:
🏝️ Fragmented land masses and floating debris
🚢 Advanced marine survival mechanics
🌊 Dynamic water world generation (not enabled by default)

Will you rise above the waves, or be lost to the endless blue?

A special thank you to all the developers of the mods in this pack!

🎃 Halloween Zombie Apocalypse 🧟 The dead have risen, and survival is no longer guaranteed. This Halloween special, the modpack will transform your world into a nightmare overrun by the undead. Can you outlast the hordes?

This Halloween Edition Features:
🧟‍♂️ Enhanced zombie hordes with increased difficulty
🌙 Darker, more atmospheric nights
🔫 Survival-focused gameplay and combat
🏚️ Apocalyptic world generation (not enabled by default)

Will you survive the apocalypse, or become one of them?
